abort.already_configured: This Photoptimizer location is already configured.

data_description.entity_id: Switch entity that will be turned on or off from the EMHASS result.
data_description.name: User-facing label for the deferrable load.
data_description.nominal_power_w: Nominal power used by EMHASS when scheduling the load.
data_description.operating_minutes: Minimum runtime that EMHASS should keep the load active.

data_description.deferrable_load_count: Number of switch-based deferrable loads to configure (0 to 2).

deferrable_load_count.description: Choose how many deferrable loads should be managed by EMHASS.
deferrable_load_count.title: Configure deferrable loads

data_description.electricity_price_entity: Entity with hourly electricity price forecast attributes.

data_description.battery_efficiency_round_trip: Round-trip battery efficiency used by optimizer.
data_description.battery_soc_entity: Entity with the current battery state of charge.
data_description.battery_soc_reserve_percent: Minimum reserve SOC that should be preserved.
data_description.battery_target_soc_percent: Target SOC at the end of optimization horizon.
data_description.current_consumption_entity: Entity used for load history and current consumption.
data_description.current_solar_production_entity: Entity with current PV production power used for near-term forecast correction.
data_description.emhass_token: Optional Bearer token for EMHASS API.
data_description.emhass_url: Base URL of your EMHASS instance.
data_description.growatt_ac_charge_switch_entity: Optional switch entity for enabling AC charging on Growatt inverters.
data_description.growatt_device_id: Optional Growatt device for direct growatt_server service calls.
data_description.growatt_inverter_variant: Select MIN/SPH if known; otherwise keep Auto.
data_description.inverter_charge_power_entity: Optional number entity used for inverter charging power percentage.
data_description.inverter_discharge_power_entity: Number entity used for inverter discharging power percentage.
data_description.inverter_mode_entity: Select entity used to set inverter operating mode (for example general, eco_charge, eco_discharge).
data_description.wear_cost_per_kwh: Optional battery degradation penalty per cycled kWh.

inverter.description: Select inverter entities. Household load is used for current load and EMHASS ML load forecast from history.
inverter.title: Configure inverter data

data_description.connect_inverter_entities: Enable this to bind GoodWe or Growatt entities. Disable it to run in command-only mode and log the commands instead of calling inverter entities.

inverter_connection.description: Choose whether Photoptimizer should connect to inverter entities or only print the commands it would send.
inverter_connection.title: Configure inverter connection mode

data_description.inverter_type: Choose which inverter brand should be controlled by Photoptimizer.

reconfigure.description: Update the EMHASS URL or access token.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EMHASS connection

data_description.entity_id: Switch entity that will be turned on or off from the EMHASS result.
data_description.name: User-facing label for the deferrable load.
data_description.nominal_power_w: Nominal power used by EMHASS when scheduling the load.
data_description.operating_minutes: Minimum runtime that EMHASS should keep the load active.

data_description.deferrable_load_count: Number of switch-based deferrable loads to configure (0 to 2).

init.description: Choose how many deferrable loads should be managed by EMHASS.
init.title: Configure deferrable loads

_.description: Triggers scheduled EMHASS actions for Photoptimizer.

trigger_type.description: Runs a 5-minute EMHASS MPC cycle (naive-mpc-optim and publish-data).
trigger_type.name: Trigger type

_.name: Photoptimizer EMHASS trigger
